title: Resolve Meshtastic Position metadata semantics
description: Why this exists: project-LICHEN-zte2.7 can decode the Meshtastic Position fields already represented in local codec tests, but upstream Position has additional metadata and ambiguous semantics that should not be guessed in the first no-hardware bridge. What needs to be done: verify the current upstream Meshtastic Position protobuf schema, decide how to handle accuracy/precision fields, decide precedence when time field 4 and timestamp field 7 disagree, decide whether location_source/altitude_source should influence HAL fix_source/source_name, decide whether accepted Position timestamps must be constrained by build-time/provision epoch floors or staleness policy, and document vectors for those cases.
notes:
2026-07-02 session note: user suggested build-time stamps in firmware or board/provisioning metadata as an epoch floor for GNSS/Position-derived timestamps. Include this as a candidate policy when resolving timestamp staleness/epoch semantics.
2026-07-02 no-hardware implementation evidence:
- Verified current upstream Meshtastic Position schema from primary source https://raw.githubusercontent.com/meshtastic/protobufs/master/meshtastic/mesh.proto: timestamp field 7 is the GPS solution timestamp; legacy time field 4 is last-heard metadata; location_source field 5, altitude_source field 6, gps_accuracy field 14, sats_in_view field 19, precision_bits field 23.
- Implemented deterministic Position timestamp policy in the Zephyr Meshtastic adapter: field 7 wins over field 4 regardless of wire order; repeated field 4 is last-wins when field 7 is absent; selected fix timestamps below CONFIG_LICHEN_MESHTASTIC_POSITION_EPOCH_FLOOR_UNIX are stripped while coordinates remain usable. The epoch floor defaults to CONFIG_LICHEN_TIME_BUILD_EPOCH_UNIX when LICHEN_HAL is enabled, otherwise 1700000000 for adapter-only builds.
- Preserved location_source, altitude_source, raw gps_accuracy_mm, precision_bits, timestamp_field_valid, epoch floor, and below-floor rejection metadata in the Position snapshot. The gateway keeps source_class LOCAL_CLIENT and records source_name as meshtastic-position, mt-pos-internal, mt-pos-external, mt-pos-manual, or mt-pos-baro-alt without upgrading trust. Raw gps_accuracy is not exported as final HAL horizontal_accuracy_mm because upstream defines it as a GPS module constant that must be combined with DOP to calculate positional accuracy.
- Added/updated canonical Meshtastic vectors for time/timestamp disagreement, duplicate time field last-wins, source/accuracy/precision metadata, and below-epoch timestamp stripping; Python vector checks now validate POSITION_APP payload fields.
- Updated docs/meshtastic-compat-dev.md and docs/firmware-time-provider.md with Position source, accuracy, timestamp, build-epoch, and provision-epoch semantics.
- Review evidence: initial independent reviews found P1 timestamp field-order/precedence issue and source_name length issue plus Kconfig portability concern; fixed. Follow-up reviews found duplicate time field first-wins, gps_accuracy semantic overclaim, and missing canonical duplicate-time vector; fixed. Final focused reviews Hume and Gauss reported no actionable findings.
- Local checks passed: git diff --check; .venv/bin/python -m pytest -q python/tests/test_vectors.py => 94 passed; .venv/bin/python -m ruff check test/vectors/generate.py python/tests/test_vectors.py => All checks passed.
- EC2 Zephyr validation on instance i-039a7a520767457f1 using EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58, disposable clone /mnt/lichen-zephyr/work/project-LICHEN-zte271-validate reset to GitHub main then patched: west twister -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_gateway_adapter -T lichen/tests/meshtastic_codec -p native_sim -p qemu_x86 --inline-logs --outdir twister-out-zte271-final2 --extra-args ZEPHYR_EXTRA_MODULES=$PWD/lichen => 4 scenarios / 8 instances selected, 6 passed, 2 static-filter skipped, 324 test cases executed, 96 skipped, 0 failed, 0 errored, 0 warnings, 119.61 seconds.
- EC2 size output: native_sim meshtastic_codec text=75821 data=793 bss=8966 dec=85580; native_sim meshtastic_adapter text=128749 data=1793 bss=40630 dec=171172; native_sim meshtastic_gateway_adapter.native text=273364 data=7475 bss=75464 dec=356303; qemu_x86 meshtastic_codec text=112464 data=6332 bss=87968 dec=206764; qemu_x86 meshtastic_gateway_adapter.qemu text=232508 data=5208 bss=155232 dec=392948; qemu_x86 meshtastic_adapter text=159536 data=4292 bss=115592 dec=279420.
2026-07-02 EC2 cleanup evidence: synced and unmounted /mnt/lichen-zephyr on i-039a7a520767457f1; detached EBS vol-0875d0df8bdf82a58 and waited until State=available Attachments=[]; terminated instance i-039a7a520767457f1; deleted temporary security group sg-0ca2fd8b604cdc95d and key pair lichen-zte271-20260702171316.
close_reason: Resolved Meshtastic Position metadata semantics with upstream schema verification, build-epoch timestamp policy, source/trust mapping, raw gps_accuracy retention, canonical vectors, docs, reviews, local checks, and EC2 native_sim/qemu Twister evidence.
